name: OBLAKO ☁️
short_description: In this relaxing puzzle game, destroy blocks and reach the heart block, which can't be destroyed. Clear tougher blocks and use crystals to break special "domino" blocks. With charming art and a soothing soundtrack, help the main characters meet while you unwind and enjoy the chill vibes!
detailed_description:
In this relaxing puzzle game, your goal is simple: destroy all the blocks and reach the heart block, which can't be destroyed. Other blocks vary in health, while the dark purple "domino" block can only be cleared with a special crystal.

Enjoy the chill vibes with adorable hand-drawn art and a soothing soundtrack that helps you unwind while guiding the main characters to finally meet. It's the perfect way to relax and immerse yourself in a heartwarming puzzle experience!

Features:

Charming Art: Adorable hand-drawn visuals.
Relaxing Puzzles: Destroy blocks to reach the heart block.
Special Mechanics: Use crystals for "domino" blocks.
Soothing Soundtrack: Calming music to enhance the experience.
Casual Fun: Easygoing gameplay for relaxation.
